title: Eat Me, Drink Me!
description: A small datapack for a family member, that allows them to shrink, or grow with edibles.
body: A small datapack for a family member, that allows them to shrink, or grow with edibles. It allows you to grow, or shrink to 5 sizes, with a Eat Me cookie, that makes you grow, and a drink me potion, that makes you shrink.
